# Manual review checklist

- [ ] Verify the complete NMCK DOCX table row count and every unit price.
- [ ] Confirm whether the spare-parts row is an independent service item or a
  commercial component governed by contract terms.
- [ ] Acquire and review the missing draft contract.
- [ ] Verify application/contract security, venue, schedule and payment terms
  directly against authoritative EIS documents.
- [ ] Confirm no requirement mentions education, SMEV/ERN or licence transfer.
- [ ] Approve or correct candidate source truth before it becomes an acceptance baseline.
